name: Praline Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. For the pastry: Stir together flour and salt. Cut in shortening until pieces are the size of small peas. Sprinkle with half a tablespoon water, gently toss with a fork. Push to one side of the bowl. Repeat with two more tablespoons water until all is moistened. Form dough into a ball. On lightly floured surface, roll out into a 12-inch circle. Place in a 9-inch pie plate. Trim pastry half an inch beyond edge and flute edge high. Do not prick. Line with double thickness of foil and bake at 450°F for 8 minutes. Remove foil, bake another 4-5 minutes until set and dry. Cool.
2. For the filling: Combine 1/3 cup brown sugar and butter in a saucepan. Cook and stir over medium heat until butter is melted and sugar is dissolved. (The mixture may appear separated.) Stir in pecans and spread over bottom of pastry shell. Cool to room temperature. Combine pumpkin, 2/3 cup brown sugar and spices. Beat lightly with a rotary beater or fork. Gradually stir in milk and rum; mix well. Place pie shell on oven rack; pour in filling. Cover edge with foil. Bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes. Remove foil, bake another 20-25 minutes more or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean. Cool on a wire rack. Cover and chill to store.
